strain.semantic: pain, fatigue, or difficult admission without caricature

soften.semantic: relief or care without glamour pose

concern.semantic: careful alarm or concern for another person

anger.semantic: anger held under discipline rather than a caricatured snarl

quiet.semantic: silence, reflection, prayer, or a restrained pause
